title: Replace anti-entropy proof surrogates with canonical MMR-backed reconciliation verifier

commands: rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenengine-node --test mmr_proof_verification
rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenengine-node --test marker_divergence_detection
rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenengine-node --test e2e_mmr_proofs_lifecycle
rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenengine-node --test e2e_marker_stream_lifecycle

verification_steps.name: python_check_anti_entropy_reconciliation_json
verification_steps.detail: Checker exposes bd-23x2 replacement evidence and bd-23x2.1 completion-debt obligations for unit, integration, and E2E coverage.

verification_steps.name: python_check_anti_entropy_reconciliation_self_test
verification_steps.detail: Checker self-test validates the structured check payload.

verification_steps.name: python_pytest_check_anti_entropy_reconciliation
verification_steps.detail: Checker regression tests include mutation coverage for missing completion-debt spec items and missing evidence paths.

verification_steps.name: operator_e2e_anti_entropy
verification_steps.detail: Operator E2E emits ANTI_ENTROPY_PARTITION, ANTI_ENTROPY_PROOF, ANTI_ENTROPY_CERTIFICATE, and ANTI_ENTROPY_RECONVERGENCE events with all required fields.

verification_steps.name: rch_cargo_heavy_reproof
verification_steps.command: rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenengine-node --test mmr_proof_verification --test marker_divergence_detection --test e2e_mmr_proofs_lifecycle --test e2e_marker_stream_lifecycle
verification_steps.detail: Fresh cargo-heavy reproof must use rch, but this turn saw pgrep cargo/rustc above the repository threshold and active rch cargo jobs.

sparse_delta_vs_fallback.reason: no fresh benchmark was launched while cargo/rustc contention was above the repository threshold

notes: bd-23x2.1 closes the audit-recorded missing items for tests.unit.primary, tests.integration.primary, and tests.e2e.primary.
The source checker requires anti_entropy.rs to delegate inclusion proof validation to control_plane::mmr_proofs::verify_inclusion with a marker hash computed from record.digest().
The operator evidence is intentionally non-cargo so it can run while cargo-heavy rch lanes are contended; Rust reproof remains documented as rch-only.
